description_long: This is an adult human figure dressed in tactical or paramilitary attire, featuring a fitted balaclava that covers the head and neck, leaving only the eyes exposed. The upper body is protected by a thick, padded vest with visible stitching and reinforced sections, suggesting ballistic or protective functionality. The figure wears a long-sleeved, close-fitting shirt with padded elbow areas, and gloves that cover the hands entirely. The pants are loose-fitting and tucked into sturdy, ankle-high boots, suitable for urban or rugged environments. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with no visible insignia or accessories, emphasizing practicality and protection.
description: An adult figure in tactical clothing with a balaclava, padded vest, gloves, and boots, designed for protection and utility in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full tactical outfit, including the balaclava, padded vest, gloves, and boots, with arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the padded vest, the fitted balaclava, and the gloves, with the arm extended straight.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the padded vest, the back of the balaclava, and the loose-fitting pants tucked into boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the vest, gloves, and boots, with the arm extended.
attribute_clothing_type: tactical outfit with balaclava, padded vest, long-sleeved shirt, gloves, and loose pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
